metadata.seed: I feel calm most of the time, but sometimes when small things pile up it feels like nothing is going the way it should, and I end up blowing up.

patient.query: Yeah, I guess I do feel like I handle things okay most of the time. But when a lot of little stressors come at once, it can feel really overwhelming. It’s like I just want to push everything away and hide for a bit. I don’t know why it gets to me so much.
